_comment: PLACEHOLDER. Sanitise from a captured production trace before un-skipping the replay test (trace id retrieved out-of-band from observability). Sanitisation rules: replace UUIDs with emp_NNN/tpl_NNN/restaurant_001; preserve positions, areas, start_time/end_time, day, date_of_birth, max_weekly_hours, availability windows, required-staff counts verbatim.
